SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-29-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT JIEWEN HUANG TO JAN-07-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT JIEWEN HUANG WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. PREVIOUS POS WAS DEFECTIVE, PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE JIEWEN HUANG PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---DOROTHY WONG. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT JIANGENG HUANG WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---DOROTHY WONG. BOTH INTERPRETERS IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,856.98 FILED BY XU, BIHUA AS TO DEFENDANT YAN, PEIHONG HUANG, JIEWEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-07-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER MARILYN LUONG. DEFENDANT PEIHONG YAN PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER AMY LO. BOTH INTERPRETERS' IDENTIFICATION HAVE BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION, PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. BOTH INTERPRETERS HAVE OATHS ON FILE WITH THE COURT. DEFENDANT JIEWEN HUANG NOT PRESENT. PLATINTIFF AND DEFENDANT PEIHONG YAN'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NO COSTS; IFP WAIVER GRANTED. PRO TEM JUDGE: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XU, BIHUA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAN, PEIHONG HUANG, JIEWEN $4,547.28 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,547.28 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT XU, BIHUA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT YAN, PEIHONG $68.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $68.00, SERVICE OF PROCESS RATED 11-17-2015 ON JIEWEN HUANG BY DELIVERY TO HIS SEPARATED SPOUSE IS NOT PROPER SERVICE & JIEWEN HUANG IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-03-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, March 3, 2016 in Department 525:
Bihua Xu, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona. Court appointed Cantonese interpreter, Bonnie Chow and interpreter's Oath is on file with the Court.

Peihong Yan, Appellant/Defendant appears as Propria Persona with witnesses Antonia Lee and Xiaohuan Huang. No Appearance by Jiewen Huang. Court appointed Cantonese interpreter, Amanda Peeters and interpreter's Oath is on file with the Court.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Bihua Xu testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court through Court appointed Cantonese interpreter Bonnie Chow.

Peihong Yan testifies on her own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court through Court appointed Cantonese interpreter Amanda Peeters. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - photos, repair invoices, & rental contract.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained. Plaintiff's Exhibits from Small Claims is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-11-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-29-2015 Continued To Jan-07-16 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-25-2015 Continued To Oct-29-15 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506
